full_text:
Hu Zhao (Kongming) 胡昭 (孔明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Zhao (胡昭), styledKongming (孔明), was born in Yingchun. Refused appointment from Yuan Shao and Wei. Helped defeat Sun Lang’s revolt. Hu Zhao lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
